threatgraph_indicators.description: A process appears to be suspiciously executing code via Powershell. Investigate the command line and process tree.
A process attempted to write a malicious payload. Review the process tree.
A process made a suspiciously high volume of outbound network requests.
A highly suspicious number of outbound Samba port connections was detected, which is common in lateral movement reconnaissance .  Review the process tree.
A process accessed system network configuration settings. Adversaries can use this for lateral movement efforts. Review the process tree.
A process gathered information about the operating system or hardware. Adversaries can use this to identify system vulnerabilities. Review the process tree.
